text: The highest and best use of the subject property, as improved, is continued use as a multi-tenant neighborhood retail building. The property’s existing configuration, zoning, physical condition, and location within an established commercial corridor support ongoing retail or service-oriented tenant occupancy. Alternative uses are limited by current zoning restrictions and the physical characteristics of the improvements and site. Vacant, the highest and best use would also be neighborhood-scale commercial development consistent with B-1 zoning and prevailing land-use patterns in the area.
